name: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing 6205-2RS1/C3
description: The SKF 6205-2RS1/C3 is a single-row deep groove ball bearing with contact seals on both sides and a C3 internal clearance. Designed for high-speed operation with minimal friction, this bearing accommodates radial and axial loads in both directions. Suitable for electric motors, pumps, and industrial gearboxes.
shortDescription: Single-row deep groove ball bearing with contact seals, C3 clearance, 25mm bore.
technicalDescription: Deep groove ball bearing with pressed steel cage, synthetic rubber seals (NBR) on both sides, and increased radial internal clearance (C3). Lubricated with high-quality lithium-based grease. Operating temperature range -40°C to +100°C.
features: Contact seals on both sides for effective contamination protection
C3 internal clearance accommodates thermal expansion
Pressed steel cage reduces weight and improves performance
Low friction design reduces energy consumption
Standardized dimensions for easy replacement
benefits: Extended service life in contaminated environments
Reduced maintenance intervals
Energy-efficient operation

images.alt: SKF 6205 Deep Groove Ball Bearing Front View
SKF 6205 Deep Groove Ball Bearing Cross Section

seoTitle: SKF 6205-2RS1/C3 Deep Groove Ball Bearing | Industrial Bearings
seoDescription: Premium SKF 6205 deep groove ball bearing with contact seals and C3 clearance. 25mm bore, 52mm OD, 15mm width. Ideal for motors, pumps, and gearboxes.

faq.question: What is the temperature range for the SKF 6205-2RS1?
faq.answer: The operating temperature range is -40°C to +100°C (-40°F to +212°F) with the standard NBR seals.

faq.question: What does C3 clearance mean?
faq.answer: C3 indicates increased radial internal clearance beyond normal range, designed for applications where temperature differences between inner and outer rings may cause expansion.

faq.question: Can this bearing be re-lubricated?
faq.answer: The 6205-2RS1 is sealed and pre-lubricated for life. It is not designed for re-lubrication.

name: NSK Angular Contact Ball Bearing 7206-B-TVP-UA
description: The NSK 7206-B-TVP-UA is a single-row angular contact ball bearing with a 40° contact angle, designed for high axial loads in one direction. Featuring a polyamide cage and universal pairing design, this bearing is ideal for machine tool spindles and high-precision applications.
shortDescription: Single-row angular contact ball bearing, 40° contact angle, universal pairing, 30mm bore.
technicalDescription: Angular contact ball bearing with 40° contact angle (B-design), polyamide window-type cage (TVP), and universal face-to-face/back-to-back arrangement (UA). Suitable for high-speed operation with combined radial and axial loads.
features: 40° contact angle for high axial load capacity
Polyamide cage for high-speed operation
Universal pairing allows tandem, back-to-back, or face-to-face mounting
Low running noise and vibration levels
Precision manufacturing to P6 or P5 tolerance classes
benefits: Superior spindle accuracy and surface finish
Reduced heat generation at high speeds
Flexible mounting configurations reduce inventory
seoDescription: High-precision NSK 7206 angular contact ball bearing with 40° contact angle, polyamide cage. 30x62x16mm. Ideal for machine tool spindles.

faq.question: What does 'UA' mean in the bearing designation?
faq.answer: UA indicates universal pairing arrangement, allowing two bearings to be mounted directly adjacent in any arrangement without shims or adjustments.

faq.question: What is the contact angle of this bearing?
faq.answer: This bearing has a 40° contact angle (B-design), optimized for high axial load capacity in one direction.

faq.question: Can this bearing handle radial loads?
faq.answer: Yes, angular contact ball bearings can handle combined radial and axial loads, with the axial load capacity increasing with the contact angle.

name: Timken Tapered Roller Bearing 30208
description: The Timken 30208 is a single-row tapered roller bearing designed to handle combined radial and axial loads. Precision-manufactured from Timken's own premium steel, this bearing delivers exceptional durability in heavy-duty applications such as truck wheel hubs, gearboxes, and mining equipment.
shortDescription: Single-row tapered roller bearing, 40mm bore, suitable for heavy radial and axial loads.
technicalDescription: Single-row tapered roller bearing with cup (outer ring) and cone (inner ring) assembly. Manufactured from case-hardened steel for optimal fatigue life. Conforms to ISO 355 dimensional standards.
features: Case-hardened steel for superior fatigue resistance
Optimized internal geometry for reduced friction
High radial and axial load capacity in one direction
Interchangeable cup and cone for flexible maintenance
Premium Timken steel metallurgy
benefits: Extended component life in harsh operating conditions
Reduced fuel consumption through lower friction
Simplified maintenance with separable components
seoTitle: Timken 30208 Tapered Roller Bearing | Heavy-Duty Industrial Bearing
seoDescription: Timken 30208 single-row tapered roller bearing. 40mm bore, 80mm OD. Case-hardened steel. Ideal for automotive, mining, and gearbox applications.

faq.question: What loads can the Timken 30208 handle?
faq.answer: The 30208 has a dynamic load rating of 80 kN and static load rating of 90 kN, suitable for heavy combined radial and axial loads.

faq.question: Can the cup and cone be replaced separately?
faq.answer: Yes, tapered roller bearings feature separable cup and cone components, allowing individual replacement to reduce maintenance costs.

faq.question: What lubricants are recommended?
faq.answer: High-quality EP gear oils or lithium-complex greases are recommended. Operating temperature range is -30°C to +120°C.

name: FAG Spherical Roller Bearing 22218-E1-XL-C3
description: The FAG 22218-E1-XL-C3 is a spherical roller bearing with an optimized internal design for maximum load capacity. Featuring the E1 performance class with a sheet steel cage, this bearing provides exceptional reliability in heavy industrial applications including mining conveyors, wind turbines, and marine propulsion systems.
shortDescription: Spherical roller bearing, E1 performance class, C3 clearance, 90mm bore, extra-long life.
technicalDescription: Double-row spherical roller bearing with optimized internal geometry (E1), sheet steel window-type cage, increased radial clearance (C3), and X-life quality for extended fatigue life. Self-aligning capability accommodates shaft misalignment.
features: X-life quality for up to 60% longer service life
Self-aligning design compensates for shaft deflection
Optimized internal geometry for high load capacity
Sheet steel cage suitable for high temperatures
C3 clearance for thermal expansion accommodation
benefits: Extended service intervals in demanding applications
Reduces downtime from misalignment-related failures
Higher operational reliability in contaminated environments
seoTitle: FAG 22218-E1-XL-C3 Spherical Roller Bearing | Industrial Bearings
seoDescription: FAG 22218 spherical roller bearing with X-life quality, E1 design, C3 clearance. 90x160x40mm. For mining, wind energy, and marine applications.

faq.question: What makes X-life bearings different?
faq.answer: X-life is FAG's premium quality designation, offering up to 60% longer fatigue life, reduced friction, and higher operating temperatures compared to standard designs.

faq.question: Can this bearing accommodate misalignment?
faq.answer: Yes, spherical roller bearings have a self-aligning feature that compensates for angular misalignment up to 1-2° depending on operating conditions.

faq.question: What is the maximum operating temperature?
faq.answer: The bearing can operate continuously at temperatures up to +200°C with appropriate lubricant selection.

name: SKF Self-Aligning Ball Bearing 1208-ETN9/C3
description: The SKF 1208-ETN9/C3 is a self-aligning ball bearing designed to accommodate misalignment and shaft deflections. Featuring a glass fiber reinforced polyamide cage and C3 clearance, this bearing is ideal for applications where shaft alignment is difficult to maintain. Widely used in fans, blowers, and textile machinery.
shortDescription: Self-aligning ball bearing with polyamide cage, C3 clearance, 40mm bore.
technicalDescription: Double-row self-aligning ball bearing with glass fiber reinforced polyamide window-type cage (ETN9), increased radial clearance (C3). The spherical raceway on the outer ring allows angular misalignment without increased stress.
features: Self-aligning design compensates for shaft deflection
Glass fiber reinforced polyamide cage for quiet operation
C3 clearance accommodates thermal expansion
Low friction for energy-efficient operation
Minimal maintenance requirements
benefits: Simplified installation and alignment procedures
Reduced vibration and noise levels
Lower energy consumption compared to other bearing types
seoDescription: SKF 1208 self-aligning ball bearing with polyamide cage and C3 clearance. 40x80x18mm. Perfect for fans, blowers, and textile machinery.

faq.question: How much misalignment can this bearing accommodate?
faq.answer: The SKF 1208 can accommodate angular misalignment up to 3-4° depending on operating conditions and load.

faq.question: Is this bearing suitable for high-speed applications?
faq.answer: Yes, with a limiting speed of 8,500 rpm with grease lubrication, it is suitable for moderate to high-speed applications like fans and blowers.

faq.question: What type of cage does this bearing use?
faq.answer: It uses an ETN9 glass fiber reinforced polyamide cage, which is lightweight, quiet, and suitable for high speeds.

name: SKF Thrust Ball Bearing 51110
description: The SKF 51110 is a single-direction thrust ball bearing designed to accommodate pure axial loads in one direction. Featuring a shaft washer, housing washer, and ball and cage assembly, this bearing is ideal for vertical shaft applications, machine tool spindles, and steering columns.
shortDescription: Single-direction thrust ball bearing, 50mm shaft diameter, for pure axial loads.
technicalDescription: Single-direction thrust ball bearing with flat seat washers, machined brass cage. Designed for axial loads in one direction only. Must not be subjected to radial loads.
features: Designed for pure axial loads in one direction
Flat seat washers for simple mounting
Machined brass cage for durability
High thrust load capacity relative to size
Separable components for easy installation
benefits: Excellent axial load capacity in compact envelope
Reliable operation in vertical shaft applications
Easy maintenance with separable washer design
seoTitle: SKF 51110 Thrust Ball Bearing | Single-Direction Axial Bearing
seoDescription: SKF 51110 single-direction thrust ball bearing. 50mm shaft bore, 78mm OD. For pure axial loads in vertical shafts and machine spindles.

faq.question: Can this bearing handle radial loads?
faq.answer: No, the 51110 is designed for pure axial loads only. Radial loads must not be applied.

faq.question: What is the difference between shaft and housing washers?
faq.answer: The shaft washer has a ground bore for tight fit on the shaft. The housing washer has a ground outer diameter for fit in the housing.

faq.question: Can this bearing be used in a horizontal shaft?
faq.answer: It is not recommended for horizontal shafts at high speeds, as the balls may not properly align under gravity alone.

name: FAG Cylindrical Roller Bearing NU210-E-XL-TVP2-C3
description: The FAG NU210-E-XL-TVP2-C3 is a single-row cylindrical roller bearing with an optimized internal design for high radial load capacity. Featuring a polyamide cage and C3 clearance, this bearing allows axial displacement of the shaft relative to the housing, making it ideal for non-locating bearing positions in gearboxes and electric motors.
shortDescription: Single-row cylindrical roller bearing, NU design, C3 clearance, 50mm bore, X-life quality.
technicalDescription: Single-row cylindrical roller bearing with NU design (two integral ribs on outer ring, no ribs on inner ring), E-type optimized internal geometry, X-life quality, polyamide window-type cage (TVP2), C3 radial clearance. Allows axial displacement of the shaft.
features: High radial load capacity with optimized roller geometry
NU design allows axial shaft displacement
X-life quality for extended service life
Polyamide cage for quiet, high-speed operation
Separable design for easy mounting and inspection
benefits: Accommodates thermal expansion in shaft systems
Reduced maintenance frequency with extended life
Lower noise and vibration in operation
seoDescription: FAG NU210 cylindrical roller bearing with X-life quality, polyamide cage, C3 clearance. 50x90x20mm. For gearboxes, motors, and compressors.

faq.question: What does the NU designation mean?
faq.answer: NU indicates a cylindrical roller bearing with two integral ribs on the outer ring and no ribs on the inner ring, allowing axial displacement of the shaft.

faq.question: Can this bearing accommodate axial loads?
faq.answer: No, NU-type bearings are designed for pure radial loads. The design allows axial shaft movement but cannot carry axial loads.

faq.question: What is the benefit of the TVP2 cage?
faq.answer: The TVP2 polyamide window-type cage is lightweight, provides excellent guidance of the rollers, and operates quietly at high speeds.

name: NSK Needle Roller Bearing RNA4905
description: The NSK RNA4905 is a drawn-cup needle roller bearing without an inner ring, designed for compact installations where space is constrained. The bearing rollers run directly on a hardened and ground shaft surface. Ideal for automotive transmissions, gear pumps, and aerospace actuation systems.
shortDescription: Drawn-cup needle roller bearing without inner ring, 25mm shaft diameter, compact design.
technicalDescription: Drawn-cup needle roller bearing without inner ring, machined-ring outer ring design. Suitable for shaft diameters of 25mm. The needle rollers provide high radial load capacity in a minimal cross-section.
features: Compact cross-section for space-constrained installations
No inner ring - rollers run directly on shaft
High radial load capacity despite small size
Hardened steel outer ring for durability
Precision-ground needle rollers for smooth operation
benefits: Reduces housing size and weight requirements
Increases load capacity in existing envelope
Cost-effective solution for compact designs
seoTitle: NSK RNA4905 Needle Roller Bearing | Compact Radial Bearing
seoDescription: NSK RNA4905 drawn-cup needle roller bearing without inner ring. 25mm shaft, 38mm OD. Compact design for automotive and aerospace applications.

faq.question: Does the shaft need special preparation?
faq.answer: Yes, the shaft must be hardened to at least HRC 58 and ground to the appropriate tolerance to serve as the inner ring raceway.

faq.question: What is the advantage of no inner ring?
faq.answer: Without an inner ring, the bearing has a smaller cross-section for the same shaft size, allowing more compact designs and higher load capacity within limited space.

faq.question: Can this bearing handle axial loads?
faq.answer: No, drawn-cup needle roller bearings are designed for pure radial loads only.

name: Timken Spherical Roller Bearing 22320-CA-W33
description: The Timken 22320-CA-W33 is a heavy-duty spherical roller bearing with a machined brass cage and an annular oil groove with three lubrication holes in the outer ring. Designed for the most demanding industrial applications including crushers, vibratory screens, and heavy conveyor systems.
shortDescription: Heavy-duty spherical roller bearing, brass cage, W33 oil groove, 100mm bore.
technicalDescription: Double-row spherical roller bearing with machined brass window-type cage (CA), annular oil groove and three lubrication holes in outer ring (W33). Designed for extreme radial and axial loads with self-aligning capability.
features: Machined brass cage for high strength and temperature resistance
W33 oil groove and lubrication holes for effective re-lubrication
Self-aligning design accommodates shaft deflection
Optimized internal geometry for extreme load capacity
Premium Timken steel for enhanced durability
benefits: Reliable operation in extreme mining environments
Extended service life with proper re-lubrication
Withstands high shock loads and vibration
seoTitle: Timken 22320-CA-W33 Spherical Roller Bearing | Mining & Heavy Industry
seoDescription: Timken 22320 heavy-duty spherical roller bearing with brass cage and W33 oil groove. 100x215x73mm. For crushers, conveyors, and offshore equipment.

faq.question: What does the W33 suffix mean?
faq.answer: W33 indicates an annular oil groove and three lubrication holes in the outer ring for effective re-lubrication.

faq.question: What type of cage does this bearing use?
faq.answer: It uses a CA-type machined brass window-style cage, offering high strength and excellent heat resistance.

faq.question: What lubricant is recommended for this bearing?
faq.answer: For heavy mining applications, an EP lithium-complex grease or ISO VG 460 gear oil is recommended, depending on operating conditions.

name: NSK Deep Groove Ball Bearing 6310-CM
description: The NSK 6310-CM is a standard deep groove ball bearing with a pressed steel cage optimized for electric motor applications. With a 50mm bore and robust construction, this bearing offers excellent performance in pumps, compressors, and industrial machinery.
shortDescription: Deep groove ball bearing for electric motors, 50mm bore, pressed steel cage.
technicalDescription: Standard deep groove ball bearing with pressed steel cage (CM - electric motor quality). Suitable for moderate to high-speed applications with radial and axial loads in both directions.
features: Electric motor quality (CM) for reduced vibration
Pressed steel cage provides excellent strength
Deep groove design handles combined loads
Standardized dimensions worldwide
Versatile operating parameters
benefits: Smooth, quiet operation in motor applications
Readily available replacement worldwide
Cost-effective solution for general industrial use
seoTitle: NSK 6310-CM Deep Groove Ball Bearing | Electric Motor Quality
seoDescription: NSK 6310-CM deep groove ball bearing with electric motor quality. 50x110x27mm. Ideal for motors, pumps, and compressors.

faq.question: What does CM suffix mean?
faq.answer: CM indicates electric motor quality with reduced vibration levels, specifically designed for electric motor applications.

faq.question: Can this bearing be ordered with shields or seals?
faq.answer: Yes, variants include 6310-Z (single shield), 6310-2Z (double shield), 6310-RS1 (single seal), and 6310-2RS1 (double seal).

faq.question: What is the temperature range?
faq.answer: The standard 6310-CM bearing operates from -30°C to +150°C with standard grease fill.

name: FAG Angular Contact Ball Bearing 7214-B-XL-MP-UA
description: The FAG 7214-B-XL-MP-UA is a high-precision angular contact ball bearing with a 40° contact angle, X-life quality, and a machined brass cage. Designed for high-speed, high-accuracy applications such as CNC spindle assemblies and precision gearboxes.
shortDescription: High-precision angular contact bearing, XL quality, brass cage, 70mm bore.
technicalDescription: Single-row angular contact ball bearing with 40° contact angle (B), X-life quality for extended service life, machined brass window-type cage (MP), and universal pairing (UA) for flexible mounting arrangements.
features: X-life quality for up to 50% longer service life
Machined brass cage for high-speed stability
40° contact angle for high axial load capacity
Universal pairing for versatile mounting
P6 precision tolerance class
benefits: Superior spindle running accuracy
Reduced heat buildup at high speeds
Extended maintenance intervals
seoDescription: FAG 7214 high-precision angular contact bearing with X-life quality. 70x125x24mm. For CNC spindles and precision gearboxes.

faq.question: What is the contact angle of this bearing?
faq.answer: The bearing has a 40° contact angle (B designation), optimized for high axial loads in one direction.

faq.question: What does universal pairing (UA) mean?
faq.answer: UA allows two bearings to be mounted directly adjacent in tandem, back-to-back (O), or face-to-face (X) arrangements without requiring any shims or adjustments.

faq.question: What is the X-life advantage?
faq.answer: X-life bearings have optimized internal geometry and surface finish, providing up to 50% longer service life and reduced friction compared to standard designs.

name: SKF SKF Food Line Ball Bearing Unit SYF 509
description: The SKF SYF 509 is a food-grade ball bearing unit designed for washdown environments in food processing and pharmaceutical applications. Featuring a stainless steel housing, FDA-approved seal, and food-grade grease, this unit withstands high-pressure cleaning and corrosive detergents.
shortDescription: Food-grade bearing unit with stainless steel housing, FDA-approved seals, 45mm bore.
technicalDescription: Stainless steel bearing unit with food-grade polyamide housing, FDA-compliant NBR seals, and NSF H1-registered food-grade grease. Y-bearing insert with set screw locking. Designed for washdown duty in hygiene-sensitive environments.
features: Stainless steel housing and bearing for corrosion resistance
FDA-approved seal material
NSF H1 food-grade grease lubrication
Set screw locking for easy mounting
Smooth outer surfaces prevent bacterial growth
benefits: Withstands aggressive washdown cleaning cycles
Meets food safety and hygiene requirements
Reduces contamination risk in production areas

images.alt: SKF SYF 509 Food Grade Bearing Unit

seoTitle: SKF SYF 509 Food Grade Bearing Unit | Stainless Steel Washdown
seoDescription: SKF SYF 509 food-grade bearing unit with stainless steel housing, FDA seals, NSF H1 grease. 45mm bore. For food processing and pharmaceutical applications.

faq.question: Can this bearing be used in wet environments?
faq.answer: Yes, the SYF 509 is specifically designed for washdown environments with stainless steel construction and FDA-approved seals.

faq.question: What type of grease is used?
faq.answer: The bearing is filled with NSF H1 registered food-grade grease, safe for incidental food contact.

faq.question: Is the housing stainless steel?
faq.answer: Yes, the housing is made from stainless steel for maximum corrosion resistance in harsh cleaning environments.
